query:
UPDATE kafka_trigger
            SET
                kafka_resource_path = $1,
                group_id = $2,
                topics = $3,
                filters = $4,
                auto_offset_reset = $5,
                script_path = $6,
                path = $7,
                is_flow = $8,
                edited_by = $9,
                permissioned_as = $10,
                edited_at = now(),
                server_id = NULL,
                error = NULL,
                error_handler_path = $13,
                error_handler_args = $14,
                retry = $15
            WHERE
                workspace_id = $11 AND path = $12
